## Verification

- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] I reviewed the change in a WebGL2-capable browser.
- [ ] I did not weaken provenance or same-environment comparison rules.

### Result submissions only

- [ ] The exact first response is preserved without repair.
- [ ] Model, provider, prompt hash, and generation harness are recorded.
- [ ] Unknown metadata and unperformed measurements are `null`.
- [ ] Orbit and close zoom were checked; failures/warnings remain visible.
- [ ] I have the right to publish the submitted artifact under this repository's license.
